entities.name: GREENHOUSE GASES
entities.description: Gases in the atmosphere that cause climate change

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shift in temperatures and weather patterns that adversely impact crop production

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops for food or other uses

entities.name: ARID AND SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Dry regions of developing countries especially affected by climate change

entities.name: ADAPTATION MEASURES
entities.description: Field level measures implemented to cope with climate change

entities.name: CROP SIMULATION MODELS
entities.description: Models that incorporate soil-crop-climate processes to quantify climate change impact and evaluate adaptation measures

entities.name: SOIL-CROP-CLIMATE PROCESSES
entities.description: Processes of plant growth incorporating soil, crop, and climate factors

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The biological process of a plant increasing in size and development

entities.name: AGRONOMIC ADAPTATIONS
entities.description: Agronomic management options to adapt crops to climate change

entities.name: LAND AND WATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Management options for land and water to adapt crops to climate change

entities.name: GENETIC ADAPTATIONS
entities.description: Genetic improvement options to adapt crops to climate change

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICAL REGION
entities.description: Tropical regions with limited rainfall where major crops are grown

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A developing country used as an example site for analyzing climate change impacts

entities.name: PEST MODELS
entities.description: Models used to analyze and predict yield losses due to pests

entities.name: DISEASE MODELS
entities.description: Models used to analyze and predict yield losses due to diseases

entities.name: WEED MODELS
entities.description: Models used to analyze and predict yield losses due to weeds

entities.name: YIELD LOSSES
entities.description: Reduction in crop output, especially due to climate change

entities.name: EXTREME WEATHER EVENTS
entities.description: Severe weather occurrences projected to increase with climate change
